examples: The accident was the result of a moment's inattention.
Vital evidence had been lost through a moment's inattention.
Jessica babbled on and on about her dance plans, completely unaware of my inattention.
As for Japan, the inattention of the world has led to underestimation of a different danger.
The appeal failed, but it illustrates one more instance of needless litigation resulting from inattention to detail.
